Workshop.intro_fact:
40 craftsmen.
800 sqm production floor.
300 km from Budva.
Workshop.intro_text: Our facility in Bar handles everything from material intake to finished unit. CNC cutting, frame assembly, finishing, and quality control — all in-house.
Workshop.step1_text: Oak, walnut, MDF — checked on arrival. Acclimatised 48h before cutting.
Workshop.step2_text: Precision cutting from client DWG or our drawings. Tolerance ±0.5mm.
Workshop.step3_text: Frame assembly, edge banding, surface finishing — lacquer or natural oil.
Workshop.step4_text: Each unit inspected before packing. EU export packaging on request.

horeca.label: HoReCa
horeca.title: Hotel & restaurant furnishing from Montenegro
horeca.description: Complete FF&E packages for hospitality projects. From hotel rooms to restaurant zones — single supplier, consistent finish.
horeca.sol1: Production staged to your construction schedule
horeca.sol2: Single supplier, consistent finish across all units
horeca.sol4: Production facility 40 km from Budva — site visits possible

education.label: Education
education.title: School & campus furniture — delivered
education.description: Classroom storage, reception areas, staff room units. We furnished a 1,200 sqm international school in Montenegro.
education.sol1: Batch production — same finish across 40+ units
education.sol2: Direct manufacturer pricing, no reseller margin
education.sol4: All dimensions cut to your floor plan

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.title: Office interiors — brief to installation
workspace.description: Desks, storage, meeting zone furniture. Custom dimensions for your floor plan.
workspace.sol1: Fixed production schedule, delivery date confirmed upfront
workspace.pain2: Multiple furniture types from one project
workspace.sol2: Desks, storage, reception — all from one supplier
workspace.sol4: One production run — identical finish throughout

residential.label: Residential
residential.title: Villas and apartments — full FF&E
residential.description: Kitchen units, living room storage, bedroom furniture for villas and branded apartments in Montenegro and EU.
residential.pain1: Interior designer has a spec, needs execution
residential.sol1: We work from DWG/PDF drawings directly
residential.sol2: Delivered and installed — or ex-works Montenegro
residential.sol4: Sample pack sent on request — oak, walnut, lacquer finishes
